name: MikroTik Open Frame 500W PSU G1070
title: MikroTik Open Frame 500W PSU G1070
short_description: High-quality replacement power supply unit specifically designed for the CRS328-24P-4S+RM switch. Provides output voltage of 53V DC at 8.8A and 26.5V DC at 17.6A. Supports wide input range of 90-264V AC.
description: The MikroTik Open Frame 500W PSU (G1070) is a high-quality replacement power supply unit specifically designed for the CRS328-24P-4S+RM switch. Engineered to ensure reliable power delivery, this PSU is essential for maintaining the efficient operation of your network infrastructure. It provides an output voltage of 53V DC with a current of 8.8A, ensuring ample power for powering PoE devices and other connected systems. The PSU also offers 26.5V DC at 17.6A, making it versatile and capable of supporting a variety of power demands within a network environment. It delivers stable power even under continuous load, making it an ideal choice for critical operations. The MikroTik Open Frame 500W PSU supports a wide input range of 90-264V AC, making it compatible with various global power standards. This flexibility ensures that the power supply can be used in a variety of installations, regardless of the local voltage infrastructure. Its robust 500W output capacity ensures that the CRS328-24P-4S+RM switch operates efficiently and without interruptions, even in demanding network setups. Designed for reliability and efficiency, this PSU is built to handle the power needs of modern networking systems, providing consistent and safe power to keep your network running smoothly.
